name: Boiled Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water to the sugar and bring to a boil until the syrup will form a thread when dropped from a spoon.
2. Slowly pour the hot syrup into the beaten egg white while continuously whisking.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Spread the icing on the cake.
5. For chocolate icing, add 2 tablespoons grated chocolate to the warm icing.
6. To tint the icing:
- Lemon juice will whiten the icing.
- The grated rind of an orange will give a yellow color.
- Strawberry, raspberry, or cranberry juice will provide a pink shade.
